segments.text: Mashing out on the respawning minecart!
segments.original_text: さあ復活しているトロッコでの暴れ

segments.text: Breaks the workbench in the process!
segments.original_text: 作業台もついでに壊して

segments.text: Grabbing the ledge with the tether!

full_text: Mashing out on the respawning minecart! Nice back air spacing! Breaks the workbench in the process! Grabbing the ledge with the tether!

corrections.original: 空中後ろうまく差し込み
